zh.Thomond, Connaught, Ireland: 愛爾蘭金德姆 本 堂蒙德
zh.Limerick, County Limerick, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 利默里克利默里克
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eilinora O’Brien Princess of Thomond, Daughter of Mór Ní Briain於1173年出生在愛爾蘭金德姆 本 堂蒙德時，她的父親King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond31歲，母親Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster19歲。她於大約1194年與William de Burgh Seneschal of Munster在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1218年2月在愛爾蘭武爾斯特享年45歲。

zh-hans.Thomond, Connaught, Ireland: 爱尔兰金德姆 本 堂蒙德
zh-hans.Limerick, County Limerick, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 利默里克利默里克
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eilinora O’Brien Princess of Thomond, Daughter of Mór Ní Briain于1173年出生在爱尔兰金德姆 本 堂蒙德时，她的父亲King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond31岁，母亲Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster19岁。她于大约1194年与William de Burgh Seneschal of Munster在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1218年2月在爱尔兰武爾斯特享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: O’Brien
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Briain ‘descendant of Brian’, a personal name probably based on the element bre- ‘hill’, with the transferred sense ‘eminence’, i.e. ‘exalted one’. See also Bryan . In Ireland there has also been some confusion with O’Byrne ( see Byrne ).

variants.name: Bryan
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Bryant  .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Briain, see O'Brien .

variants.name: Byrne
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Aidan, Liam, Niall, Declan, Eamonn, Fergus, John Patrick, Keelin, Kieran, Siobhan.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Broin ‘descendant of Bran’, a personal name based on bran ‘raven’. Bran was the name of a son of the King of Leinster, who died at Cologne in 1052, and also of the hero of an 8th century voyage tale.
Irish: in some cases, possibly from Ó Birn ‘descendant of Biorn’, Irish form of the Old Norse personal name Bjǫrn.

variants.name: O’Byrne
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Broin (  see  Byrne  ).

en.lifeSummary: When Eilinora O’Brien Princess of Thomond, Daughter of Mór Ní Briain was born in 1173, in Kingdom of Thomond, Ireland, her father, King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond, was 31 and her mother, Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster, was 19. She married William de Burgh Seneschal of Munster about 1194, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in February 1218, in Ulster, Ireland, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eilinora O’Brien Princess of Thomond, Daughter of Mór Ní Briain est née en 1173, à Kingdom of Thomond, Irlande, son père, King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé William de Burgh Seneschal of Munster environ 1194, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en février 1218, à Ulster, Irlande, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eilinora O’Brien Princess of Thomond, Daughter of Mór Ní Briain 1173 in Kingdom of Thomond, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond 31 und ihre Mutter Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster 19. Sie hat um 1194 in Irland William de Burgh Seneschal of Munster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im Februar 1218 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Ulster, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eilinora O’Brien Princess of Thomond, Daughter of Mór Ní Briain è nata il nel 1173 nel Kingdom of Thomond, Irlanda, sua padre, King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato William de Burgh Seneschal of Munster circa 1194, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel febbraio 1218, nel Ulster, Irlanda, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eilinora O’Brien Princess of Thomond, Daughter of Mór Ní Briainが1173年にアイルランドキングドム オフ ソモンドで生まれた時，父King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomondは31歳，母Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinsterは19歳であった。約1194年にアイルランドでWilliam de Burgh Seneschal of Munsterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1218年2月にアイルランドウルスターで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eilinora O’Brien Princess of Thomond, Daughter of Mór Ní Briain(이)가 1173년 아일랜드 킨그돔 프 톰드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1194년 아일랜드에서 William de Burgh Seneschal of Munster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1218년 2월 아일랜드 울스터에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eilinora O’Brien Princess of Thomond, Daughter of Mór Ní Briain nasceu em 1173, em Kingdom of Thomond, Irlanda, seu pai, King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Burgh Seneschal of Munster aproximadamente 1194, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em fevereiro de 1218, em Ulster, Irlanda, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eilinora O’Brien Princess of Thomond, Daughter of Mór Ní Briain родилась в 1173 г. в местности кингдом оф томонд, Ирландия, её отцу по имени King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Burgh Seneschal of Munster около 1194 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла февраль 1218 г. в местности улстир, Ирландия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eilinora O’Brien Princess of Thomond, Daughter of Mór Ní Briain nació en 1173, en Kingdom of Thomond, Irlanda, su papá, King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster, tenía 19 años. Se casó con William de Burgh Seneschal of Munster aproximadamente 1194, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en febrero de 1218, en Ulster, Irlanda, a la edad de 45 años.
